$comment: scripts/Museum1F.asm — the side-room scientist's OLD AMBER. give_item's full-bag abort leaves GOT_OLD_AMBER unset (re-offer; the retired beat's one-off 'space for this' refusal normalizes to give_item's 'room for this'). Talking to the side-room SCIENTIST (15,2); the amber prop at (16,2) leaves the desk (the _shown record persists it).

then.text:
Ssh! Get the OLD
AMBER checked!

else.text:
Ssh! I think that
this chunk of
AMBER contains
POKéMON DNA! It would be great
if POKéMON could
be resurrected
from it! But, my colleagues
just ignore me! So I have a favor
to ask! Take this to a
POKéMON LAB and
get it examined!
